leadText: The Silver Powder (Japanese: ぎんのこな Silver Powder), formatted SilverPowder prior to Generation VI, is a type of held item introduced in Generation II that boosts the power of Bug-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Bug-type moves by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Bug-type moves by 20%.
